title: Silvergate’s Fraher breaks silence on settlement with Gensler’s SEC
summary: Former Silvergate executive Kate Fraher said the rule that prevented her from sharing her side of the story was unconstitutional. It was finally lifted by the SEC this week.

title: Tax evaders are trying ‘novel digital assets’ to dodge authorities: Chainalysis
summary: Italian authorities uncovered a tax evasion scheme in which an individual allegedly used Bitcoin Ordinals and the BRC-20 token standard to generate and conceal $1.1 million.

title: Junk Debt’s Red-Hot Rally Sparks Complacency Fears as Risk Rises
summary: Junk debt is beating just about everything else in fixed-income markets after surging yields wiped out gains on most other bonds. Yet with high-yield credit spreads near two-decade lows, investor unease is building.

title: Deere Keeps Outlook With Construction Boost as Farmers Struggle
summary: Deere & Co. reiterated its annual profit outlook Thursday as gains in construction and forestry helped to offset a still-slumping agricultural economy.

title: Bitcoin Firm Nakamoto Plots 1-for-40 Stock Split Following 99% Price Plunge
summary: Bitcoin treasury company Nakamoto aims to massively reduce its share count as it seeks a price of at least $1 to regain Nasdaq compliance.

title: Shai-Hulud: What to Know About the Malware Spreading Through Software Pipelines
summary: The Shai-Hulud supply-chain malware campaign is exploiting the automated systems developers trust to publish software safely.

title: Fantasy Top to shut down, says trading card game model was ‘never built’ for crypto
summary: Its founder said that financialized crypto trading card games attract speculators rather than players.

title: Wife of Sandbox co-founder Sebastien Borget targeted in kidnapping attempt at home in France: report
summary: The wife of Sandbox co-founder Sebastien Borget was targeted in a kidnapping attempt as France logs over 41 crypto kidnappings in 2026.
